title: 🐦 Macaws
body:
Chatty companions for your adventures!

- Spawns in Jungles!
- Tameable with seeds!
- Will sit on your shoulders (right-click)!
- When on your shoulders, the Macaw will tell you any new items entering your inventory!

![Macaw in Inventory with Apple](https://cdn.mcbrawls.net/misc/macaws/inventory-apple.png)

![Macaw on Shoulders](https://cdn.mcbrawls.net/misc/macaws/shoulders.png)

![Macaw on Shoulders with Hotbar Showing](https://cdn.mcbrawls.net/misc/macaws/inventory-shoulders.png)
